notes: Backend went unresponsive during iter (parallel-agent contention). Trigger click did NOT navigate immediately because /trigger/event is synchronous and ran for full lifecycle (~60s+); UI button shows live SSE progress instead. Phase verification done against event 96 (prior, fully completed) since event 98 (mine) stuck mid-lifecycle. Discovered + fixed builder_code rendering bug (was literal 'polyglot_alpha' fallback instead of real 0xa934... hex).
issues_observed: Backend /trigger/event blocks until lifecycle complete (~60s) — TriggerButton's router.push immediately-after-await never fires until full lifecycle done
Backend saturated by 3 parallel sub-agents triggering events concurrently
Event 98 stuck at EVALUATING after 4 phases (multi-instance DB contention)

bugs_fixed.desc: Builder-code badge fell back to literal 'polyglot_alpha' string when polymarket nested object lacked builderCode. Added fallback chain: event.polymarket.builderCode -> phase.details.builder_code -> event.builder_code (top-level snake_case from API) -> literal default.
Long 0x...64-hex codes overflowed the badge UI. Added formatBuilderCode() to render as `0xabcd…1234` with full value in title/aria-label.
